cases.criteria: Subject contains ('code', 'otp', 'verification') AND (body contains digits OR has_attachment=false)
cases.description: Ensures login codes are never delayed even if the sender is unknown or generic.

cases.criteria: Subject contains ('cancelled', 'subscription', 'deactivated') AND sender is known service
cases.description: Crucial to keep as proof of service termination to avoid unwanted charges.

cases.criteria: Header 'In-Reply-To' exists OR subject starts with 'Re:'
cases.description: Prevents personal conversations from being junked just because they originate from a domain like 'linkedin.com' or 'gmail.com'.

cases.criteria: Has attachment with '.ics' extension OR contains 'calendar invite'
Subject contains ('payment failed', 'declined', 'action required', 'update payment') AND sender in infrastructure_list
cases.description: Prevents service interruption for critical tools (SaaS, hosting, utilities).

cases.criteria: Subject contains ('gift card', 'egift', 'reward') AND sender is reputable retailer
cases.description: Digital assets shouldn't be lost in promotional filters.

cases.criteria: Subject contains ('shipped', 'delivered', 'out for delivery') AND previous_state='confirmed'
cases.description: Transactional updates for physically arriving items should be tracked.

cases.criteria: Subject contains bracketed ID like '[#12345]' OR sender contains 'support'
cases.description: Active support tickets are high priority regardless of domain score.
While surveys are usually promotional, those linked to recent support are relevant for service quality.

cases.criteria: Subject contains ('you're in', 'beta access', 'waitlist update', 'early access')
cases.description: High-value promotional-style invites that the user specifically requested.
